duplicate_check.mechanism_keyword_overlap_with_prior_rou: R338 cassowary casque (low-pass residual branch) shares the low-frequency-protection theme but operates as an added branch rather than passive interfacial dissipation. R301 glasswing (tapered amplitude embedding) is depth-scaled init/projection but smooths boundary, doesn't impose passive dissipation barrier between layer groups.

verdict: ACCEPT-WITH-ADJACENCY-NOTE (adjacent to R338 low-pass residual branch + R301 anti-reflection; distinct in passive density-mismatch interfacial barrier between fast/slow layer groups)
